headlines.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of U.S. troops
headlines.description: The President was at Dover Air Force Base in Delaware today for the dignified transfer of four military personnel killed in recent days in the Middle East as attacks between the U.S. and Iran have escalated. One of the families of the fallen then flew home to Georgia aboard Air Force One with President Trump. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Pete Hegseth Estimates US War With Iran Has Cost $37.5B So Far
headlines.description: The United States launched yet another round of airstrikes against the Iranian regime Tuesday, just hours after the Pentagon asked Congress for an additional $67 billion to support the ongoing conflict. “We’re not finished at all,” President Donald Trump said of the war. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Send your questions for Richard Engel on the war with Iran and more
headlines.description: The United States is about to enter its fifth month of war with Iran, and NBC News’ chief foreign correspondent Richard Engel has been covering all the developments.

headlines.title: U.S. signs landmark nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia
headlines.description: The U.S. will support creating a civilian nuclear power program in the kingdom under the agreement, a senior administration official told NBC News.

headlines.title: Oil surges past $95 as U.S. downplays Iran diplomacy and 2nd key trade route is disrupted
headlines.description: The international benchmark Brent crude rose almost 5% to hit more than $95 per barrel for the first time in almost six weeks.

headlines.title: Trump hypes Mike Collins’ Senate campaign at Georgia rally
headlines.description: GOP Rep. Mike Collins is taking on Sen. Jon Ossoff, a well-funded Democrat, in a key battleground race.

headlines.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall in Louisiana
headlines.description: Tropical Storm Bertha made landfall in Louisiana, bringing strong winds to the Gulf Coast. The storm is expected to bring minor storm surges as it moves towards Texas.

headlines.title: Nolan Wells preliminary autopsy results released
headlines.description: A forensic pathologist hired by the family of Nolan Wells says so far the cause and manner of death is undetermined. The autopsy was performed four days after his body was found. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist has the story.

headlines.title: Ukraine targets Russian online retailer Wildberries
headlines.description: Ukrainian long-range drones targeted large warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia’s equivalent of Amazon, which sells military equipment like body armor and drone parts, but mainly serves as a place for regular Russians to sell their goods. President Zelenskyy said the warehouses are “involved in supplying the Russian army,” adding that Ukraine is “brining the war home – to Russia.”

headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: ‘Off the charts’: Secret Service describes rising threats to protectees
headlines.description: Despite the heightened environment, the Secret Service says it’s confident in plans for the rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner.
